text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer is here, and with it comes the academy's
large-scale group training camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a member of the student council, Air Groove
has her work cut out for her taking care of the
rowdy and excited younger students.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she doesn't intend to use that as an
excuse to slack off on training for the Shuka Sho.
